## Source: amazon-inspector (3096bbbc1b06c1a0df854ff812112a3d902b8a5c8926880c146f8b36e8497897)
The package vv-ftend-core was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (5068b5b0eb66dc1e407d0833b7c1fb5f34b54fef2534e779d63c0cb52d227514)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'vv-ftend-core' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
